memory:memory/2026-04-02.md:117:132.snippet: 4. **Raw `[EXPENSE_LOGGED]` tags visible in chat:** Parser wasn't catching inline tags. Added regex cleanup pass in `AgentResponseParser` to strip any remaining tags from display text. 5. **"Can you confirm?" confusion:** Dedup was returning "duplicate skipped" to model → model asked for confirmation. Changed to return SUCCESS message so model thinks it worked (it already did). 6. **Tab switch too aggressive:** Question mark in "Can you confirm?" triggered Pilot switch. memory:memory/2026-04-02.md:107:120.snippet: - **Inline mode:** Created `AppState` shared across tabs. `sendInline()` processes agent request WITHOUT switching tabs. Data refreshes via `@Query`.
